title: Find My Device - User location on the map
scenario: Find My Device map shows inconsistent location indicator behavior between Android (blue circle with dot when zoomed in) and iOS (white circle when zoomed in)
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset either connected or disconnected.
2. Navigate to the App Menu (hamburger menu or menu icon).
4. If prompted, allow GPS location access.
5. Observe the map view showing the user's location.
6. Zoom out on the map and observe the location indicator.
7. Zoom in on the map and observe the location indicator.
expected: On Android: A full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a blue circle with a full blue dot in the middle is shown when zoomed in. On iOS: A full blue dot is shown when zoomed out, and a white circle is shown when zoomed in.
